name: Nutanix SOC Sandbox
summary: Pipelines and rules for parsing Nutanix Prism Central logs (sandbox).
description: Contains 8 pipeline rules and 2 pipelines for parsing api_audit, consolidated_audit, flow_service, and cvm_audit. All reference data is fictional.

source.@value:
rule "Nutanix - Flag External Access"
when
    has_field("nutanix_client_type") AND
    contains(to_string($message.nutanix_client_type), "External")
then
    set_field("nutanix_external_access", true);
    set_field("nutanix_alert_type", "external_api_access");
end

rule "Nutanix CVM - Drop Broken"
when
    has_field("message") AND to_string($message.message) == "o"
then
    drop_message();
end
